name: Motion UI
summary: Animation, transitions, and motion-oriented presentation primitives for Angular clients.

name: Common UI
summary: Shared Angular primitives, cards, actions, and cross-app presentation building blocks.

name: Navigation UI
summary: Reusable app bars, sidebars, tabs, and navigation shells for Angular clients.

name: Theme UI
summary: Theme-oriented Angular UI, selectors, controls, and presentation helpers.

name: Form UI
summary: Reusable form controls, field layouts, and validation-oriented Angular components.

name: Notification UI
summary: Notification center, alert, and inbox-oriented Angular UI for shared platform surfaces.

name: Store UI
summary: Commerce, cart, product, and donation-facing Angular components for storefront experiences.

name: Auth UI
summary: Authentication, account access, and sign-in presentation for Angular frontends.

name: Profile UI
summary: Profile, identity, and account-management Angular components shared across apps.

name: Chat UI
summary: Conversation, transcript, and chat-surface Angular UI shared across interactive clients.

name: Message UI
summary: Messaging-focused Angular components and presentation for inbox and direct-message flows.

name: Search UI
summary: Search, discovery, and exploration components for Angular client interfaces.

name: Persona UI
summary: Persona-selection and assistant-facing Angular UI for conversational experiences.

name: AG Grid UI
summary: Theme-aware Angular wrappers and utilities around AG Grid for data-heavy screens.

name: Social UI
summary: Posts, comments, reactions, and shared frontend support for social flows.

name: Blogging UI
summary: Editorial and publishing components including compose, hero, author, and comment surfaces.

name: Community UI
summary: Community and post-centric Angular UI for group, feed, and discussion surfaces.

name: Forum UI
summary: Forum and threaded-discussion Angular components for long-form conversation surfaces.

name: Project UI
summary: Project, task, and workflow Angular UI used by Forge of Will and related apps.
